query:
SELECT 
  season,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.seasonId')) as seasonId,
  view_name,
  fetched_at,
  CHAR_LENGTH(CAST(payload AS CHAR)) as payload_size
FROM espn_cached_views 
WHERE season >= 2025
ORDER BY season DESC, fetched_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
